description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this dark olive green handbag from fastrack will come in handy! Look trendy and chic as you pair it with your casual outfits when you go to the mall or to college. And don't you be deceived by its compact look, for there's ample space to hold all your essentials! Made of nylon for durability and comfort One main roomy zippered pocket with a smaller inner zippered pocket to stash away essentials Two buttoned pockets on the front Flap that starts at the back, goes over the main compartment and buttons the pocket on the front Single adjustable strap to hang the bag from the shoulder Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Zippered compartment at the back Nylon bonded thread for long life Brand name printed and embroidered on the front Brand tab appliqued on the side CareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
